hero.title: Trusted Tech Services for Your Business
hero.subtitle: We provide modern apps, websites, and digital services — secure, reliable, and built to grow your business in the Kingdom.
hero.desktop_text: Professional website or application solutions for your business operations.
hero.mobile_text: Custom mobile apps to engage your customers anywhere.

serviceSection.title: Our Services
